summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Zitex AI creative platform. Backend API tests 100% successful, frontend core functionality working with some authentication issues.

integration_issues.issue: User sessions expire quickly, requiring re-login when navigating between pages

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with Zitex logo and Arabic RTL design
Admin login with owner credentials successful
Pricing page shows all packages and services with working tabs
Backend API endpoints all functional (100% success rate)
Image/video generation endpoints correctly restrict access without subscription
action_item_for_main_agent: Session management: Consider extending JWT token expiry time or implementing token refresh functionality for better user experience
